items.summary: Arriving in Yaoundé on Wednesday, Pope Leo XIV pressed Cameroon’s leaders to address corruption, setting the tone for a high-stakes visit.

items.headline: 'Unprecedented' fire at Australian oil refinery to affect nation's petrol supplies
items.summary:
[BBC News] The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.

[Africanews] Fire at Viva Energy's Geelong refinery, which supplies 10% of Australia’s fuel, sparks supply fears as Iran war keeps global prices elevated.

items.headline: Kenya hikes fuel prices as supply tightens

items.headline: Nigeria drops terrorism charges against ex-justice minister: lawyer
